summary: Iteration 2: Comprehensive backend + frontend verification of new live CISA KEV sync, per-risk KEV enrichment, MDR advisory panel, remediation hints, and NIST source-URL surfacing. All 6 backend pytest tests pass against the live preview URL; all targeted frontend data-testids render and behave as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 961 lines; consider splitting into modules (routers/health, routers/risks, services/kev, services/nist) for maintainability.
apply_kev_enrichment / get_remediation_hint perform per-vulnerability DB look-ups inside analyze_top_risks loops; if dataset grows this becomes N+1 — fine at current sample scale.
CORS still uses allow_credentials=true with wildcard origins default; tighten before production.

POST /api/data/sample clears uploaded CSV collections but does NOT clear previously uploaded threat_reports — UI MDR advisory panel may keep rendering stale data after a 'reset to sample'. Worth confirming with PM whether that is intended.
seed_data_creation: Pytest test_data_upload_then_sample_reset uploads 6 multipart files (assets, vulnerabilities, threat_intelligence, business_services, remediation_guidance, synthetic_threat_report.md) and then resets via /api/data/sample. A small synthetic_threat_report.md from a prior iteration remains in db.threat_reports so the MDR advisory panel stays visible for retests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest covers: GET /api/health (now with kev_status block), POST /api/nist/sync, POST /api/cisa-kev/sync, GET /api/risks/top?limit=5 (now requires kev_evidence, remediation_hint, kev_status, threat_report top-level), GET /api/threat-report, POST /api/data/upload + POST /api/data/sample. Frontend verified via Playwright: sync-cisa-kev-button click triggers live sync and shows 'Synced 1590 CISA KEV entries from the live catalog.' banner; metric-kev-entries-value renders 1590; console-kev-status visible; risk-kev-evidence-RISK-01 + risk-kev-source-RISK-01 (https://www.cisa.gov/.../known_exploited_vulnerabilities.csv) present; risk-guidance-source-RISK-01-* link to NIST CSRC; mdr-advisory-panel visible and mdr-advisory-toggle expands/collapses mdr-advisory-content correctly. Environment left in SAMPLE_DATA_PLACEHOLDER mode (threat-report still present from earlier upload).
rca of the issue: No issues found this iteration. Note: kev_evidence.date_added is populated only when the vulnerability's CVE actually appears in the live KEV catalog; for sample vulns flagged cisa_kev=true whose CVE is not in CISA's current CSV, date_added will legitimately be null. Test now asserts >=1 risk has a populated date_added rather than every kev_evidence row, which matches the documented behavior.
